## Summary

Describe the user-facing change and its evidence impact.

## Evidence and safety checklist

- [ ] I did not add private material, contact information, credentials, or machine-specific paths.
- [ ] I preserved the distinction between measured, documented, inferred, and designed statements.
- [ ] I ran the relevant local validators.
- [ ] I certify this contribution under the Developer Certificate of Origin: `Signed-off-by: Name <email>`.
